title: Nutty Crispy Japanese Parmigiano-Reggiano Crumble
description: A comforting Japanese dish featuring air-fried crumbled Parmigiano-Reggiano sprinkled with nuts for a nutty and crispy texture, suitable as a snack or light meal.
instructions: Grate the Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese and mix it with the mixed nuts and pinch of sea salt.
Stir in the low-sodium soy sauce until well combined.
Divide the mixture into small portions for easy crumbled pieces.
Place the grated cheese-nut-soy sauce mixture on a wire rack inside your air fryer basket.
Air-fry for 8-10 minutes or until crispy, turning once halfway through cooking time.
Serve warm as a snack or light meal with a side of pickled vegetables.
